## What & why

<!-- Briefly describe the change and the reason for it. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Design guidance (content in `content/guidance/`)
- [ ] Component implementation (`src/components/`)
- [ ] Build / CI / config
- [ ] Docs

## Checklist

- [ ] Added a changeset if this changes the published library (`yarn changeset`)
- [ ] Stories updated/added for any component change
- [ ] Design guidance updated if behaviour or usage changed
- [ ] Checked the PR preview renders correctly (link appears in a comment)
- [ ] `yarn lint`, `yarn typecheck` and `yarn format:check` pass locally
